cards.back: The process of dividing an image into its constituent parts or objects.
A technique used in image segmentation to locate specific points of interest in an image, such as corners or features.
A technique used in image segmentation to identify lines or edges in an image, often used for object recognition and tracking.
A technique used in image segmentation to identify the boundaries or edges of objects in an image, often used for object recognition and tracking.
A technique used in image segmentation to convert an image into a binary image by setting all pixels above a certain threshold value to white and all pixels below to black.
